arts.ttl: Guardiola hits back at Capello's 'arrogant' jibe
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola says he has "raised the bar" in the Premier League following criticism from ex-England coach Fabio Capello.

arts.ttl: Haaland becomes quickest to 100 Premier League goal involvements
arts.sum: His 36 goals in 2022/23 remains the record-high single season tally for a player, while he also contributed eight assists in a stellar debut year in Manchester. This latest landmark comes in our No.9’s third season at the Etihad Stadium, having won the Golden Boot in the last two terms as we lifted the Premier League title.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Manchester City host Brighton in the Premier League
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's side search for a win against Brighton in an attempt to edge into the top four - ESPN has live updates.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 2-1 Man City: Yui Hasegawa scores late own goal as Sonia Bompastor delivers Blues' first trophy of the post-Emma Hayes era
arts.sum: TARA ANSON-WALSH AT PRIDE PARK: When Emma Hayes lost this trophy last March, few would have believed that it would take less than 12 months for Chelsea to be in this position.

arts.ttl: This is the official reason why Tariq Lamptey misses Manchester City match despite serving suspension
arts.sum: Brighton remain without flying full-back Tariq Lamptey for the crunch Premier League match at Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Diego Gomez decision explained as Brighton boss Fabian Hurzeler sends clear message to Man City
arts.sum: All the latest Premier League team news for Brighton and Hove Albion at Manchester City

arts.ttl: Man City suffer fresh injury blow before Premier League match vs Brighton
arts.sum: Manchester City have been bit my more injury woes ahead of their Premier League game with Brighton

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Brighton confirmed lineups: Omar Marmoush returns as Pep Guardiola makes injury-enforced change
arts.sum: Manchester City and Brighton & Hove Albion confirm their starting lineups for this afternoon's Premier League clash at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: After England snub: Grealish tells Tuchel he wants OUT of Man City
arts.sum: Jack Grealish is frustrated with his bit-part role at Manchester City, according to England boss Thomas Tuchel. England boss Thomas Tuchel has now revealed that he would have loved to call up Grealish but that he simply couldn't justify his inclusion due to his lack of 'rhythm.'

arts.ttl: Manchester City v Brighton, Everton v West Ham and more football: clockwatch – live
